caption: Step 1: Open Screener.in - India's popular stock research platform
description: Open Screener.in - India's popular stock research platform
narration: Let's start by opening Screener.in - India's popular stock research platform. It gives the walkthrough a clean starting point before the real automation work begins.

caption: Step 2: Navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page
description: Navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page
narration: Next, we navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page. That skips the wandering and gets the important screen in front of us fast.

caption: Step 3: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
description: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
narration: From there, we view key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot. It gives us the quick snapshot before we go deeper.

caption: Step 4: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
description: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
narration: Now we review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance. This is where the screen starts telling a story instead of just showing raw numbers.

caption: Step 5: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
description: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
narration: After that, we inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins. A close look here makes the important signal easier to spot.

caption: Step 6: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
description: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
narration: Next, we check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity. One quick check here tells us whether things look solid or stretched.

caption: Step 7: Open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters
description: Open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters
narration: From there, we open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters. It gives the walkthrough a clean starting point before the real automation work begins.

caption: Step 8: Open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria
description: Open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria
narration: Now we open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria. It gives the walkthrough a clean starting point before the real automation work begins.

caption: Step 9: Browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap
description: Browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap
narration: After that, we browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap. This keeps comparison easy without opening every result by hand.

caption: Step 10: Open Bank of India from the screen for deeper analysis
description: Open Bank of India from the screen for deeper analysis
narration: Next, we open Bank of India from the screen for deeper analysis. It gives the walkthrough a clean starting point before the real automation work begins.

caption: Step 11: Tutorial complete - you can now research and compare stocks on Screener.in
description: Tutorial complete - you can now research and compare stocks on Screener.in
narration: And that is the finish line. The flow is now captured end to end and ready to replay or adapt.
